reviews.comment:
YPF Full no tiene cocina habilitada (fines de noviembre 2021) por ende solo ofrece comidas frias. Para cargar combustible bastante demora.

(Translated by Google)
YPF Full does not have a kitchen open (as of late November 2021), therefore it only offers cold meals. Fueling up takes quite a while.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
